request.label: Email newsletters
request.policy: Collect recent newsletter items, extract useful AI sections/headlines, and skip promotional filler.

sources.name: TLDR AI
sources.note: Local runner cannot read Gmail by itself. Use the Gmail connector or export matching newsletters into this data folder.
